form.formComment: Last start 10th (Sr1) over 1730m at Gloucester Park, beaten 18 m by Vinnies Star (2:08.60) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 7 at $126. Two runs back 8th (Sr1) over 1609m at Bunbury beaten 30 m by Karaoke Star (1:58.40) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on April 4 at $81. Would prefer to see a return to form before recommending.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced shortly after the start was effected.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth behind Elephant Rock at Gloucester Park over 2130m in a 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 17 at $12. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second after a quick start, behind Love Devine at Bridgetown over 1784m in a 4yo+ NR up to 49 M on March 22 at $2.20. Progressing well. Leading player.
